message.entry: Unable to open file ''{0}'' for writing:\n\n{1}
The file type ''{0}'' is ambiguous.
Unrecognized file extension ''{0}''. Use the 'FileType' parameter to specify the file type.
Unrecognized file type ''{0}''. The 'FileType' parameter must be 'text', 'spreadsheet', or 'xml'.
Delimiter must be a character vector or string scalar.
Delimiter must be one of these characters: ' ', '\\t', ',', ';', '|', or its corresponding character name: 'space', 'tab', 'comma', 'semi', or 'bar'.
The range must be a character vector of the form ''A1:B2'' or ''A1''.
Could not start Excel server for export. Export to a text file instead.

Error writing table to ''{0}'':

{1}
The data block starting at cell ''{0}'' exceeds the sheet boundaries by {1, number, integer} row(s) and {2, number, integer} column(s).
Unable to write to file ''{0}''. You may not have write permissions or the file may be open by another application.
Unable to write to sheet ''{0}'' in file ''{1}''. Disable sheet protection, disable workbook's Mark as Final option, and ensure input does not exceed cell capacity.
Unable to write to file ''{0}''. Ensure the file is a valid spreadsheet file and is not password protected.
Writing timetable to a file is not supported. Use TIMETABLE2TABLE to convert to table.
First argument must be a table.
First argument must be a {0}.
Writing nested tables/timetables is not supported. Use SPLITVARS on the nested table before writing.
Name not specified. Filename must include name of the file.
'WriteRowNames' is not available for {0}. To write a TABLE with row names use WRITETABLE.
'WriteVariableNames' is not available for {0}. To write a TABLE or TIMETABLE with variable names use WRITETABLE or WRITETIMETABLE.
Unsupported type ''{0}''. Convert the data to numeric, logical, string, datetime, duration, or categorical before writing.
Unsupported cell element of type ''{0}''. Convert the element to numeric, logical, string, datetime, duration, or categorical before writing.
Unsupported type ''{0}''. Use {1} instead.
Nested cell arrays are not supported.
Wrong number of arguments. A filename must be provided when supplying additional parameters, and each parameter name must be followed by a value.
Incorrect argument order. {0} expects a {1} as its first argument and a filename as its second argument.
Unknown write function {0}.
Unable to write file ''{0}''.
'Range' is not supported with 'WriteMode' 'append'.
'WriteVariableNames' is not supported with 'WriteMode' 'append'.
Variable ''{0}'' contains cell column vectors. Writing variables containing cell column vectors to a spreadsheet using WRITETABLE is unsupported.
Variable ''{0}'' contains a nested cell array with an empty element. Writing nested cell arrays containing empty elements to a spreadsheet using WRITETABLE is unsupported.
Unrecognized file type ''{0}''. The 'FileType' parameter must be one the following:\n\n {1}
